'''Tyne's Horky''' was an [[Ore/Legends|ore]]-rich [[Mining/Legends|mining]] [[Planet/Legends|world]] in the [[Teraab sector/Legends|Teraab sector]]. Its streets were full of mining and service [[Droid/Legends|droids]], used to mine [[Keschel]] and [[Nergon-14/Legends|Nergon-14]].

==History==
In [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]], shortly before the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], [[Zorba Desilijic Tiure]] was imprisoned on [[Kip]] and his property holdings on Tyne's Horky were taken over by his son, [[Jabba Desilijic Tiure/Legends|Jabba]]. The [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] later controlled the [[Mining/Legends|mining]] on the [[Planet/Legends|world]].

It was on this mining world that [[Jann Tosh]] lived with his [[Putch Gundarian|uncle Gundy]] and where they met [[R2-D2/Legends|R2-D2]], [[C-3PO/Legends|C-3PO]], and [[Mon Julpa|Kez-Iban]]. [[Kleb Zellock]] was the leader of the criminal underworld on this planet and used to run a [[Nergon-14/Legends|Nergon-14]] mine.

==Behind the scenes==
In the [[Star Wars: Droids: The Adventures of R2-D2 and C-3PO|''Droids'']] series, Tyne's Horky is the name of a mining planet. However, in the [[The Lost Prince: A Droid Adventure|book version]] of the ''Droids'' episode "[[The Lost Prince]]," it is the name of a town on that planet; the planet itself is not named in the book.

{{Planet-stub}}
